author: IGN YouTube
text:
Never Look Back - Official Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the announcement trailer for Never Look Back, a psychological, rule-based horror game set on an infinite liminal staircase. Players have to descend the staircase, squeeze a cute rubber
duck, and never look back as the Darkness follows behind. Never Look Back is coming to PC (Steam) in November 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls - Official Captain America Character Guide
Check out the Character Guides, a video series designed to help you master the heroes and villains of Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls. Each guide breaks down normal attacks, unique skills, and core tools so you can sharpen your play and dominate the battle. We begin with Captain America, covering his mid-air attacks, anti-airs, Vibranium Shield counters, Ricochet Volley, and more. Bring justice to every fight!

MARVEL Tokon: Fighting Souls is coming to PS5 and PC on August 6, 2026!

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stellar Blade: Everything MAJOR Added Since Launch
With the surprise announcement of Stellar Blade: Blood Rain and a Nintendo Switch 2 port at Summer Game Fest 2026, the hype for Shift Up's hit action RPG is back in full swing. Whether you're a veteran player looking to dive back into Xion or a newcomer preparing to experience Eve's journey for the first time, there's never been a better moment to catch up. From early quality-of-life adjustments to massive post-launch expansions, here is a complete look at everything major going on with Stellar Blade since its original launch.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Zenless Zone Zero v3.1: Official Void Hunter Agent Remielle Trailer
Get an early look at the Void Hunter Agent Remielle in Zenless Zone Zero Version 3.1! This preview of in-development content showcases Remielle's distinctive visual design, signature moves, and in-game combat style. Remielle will make her official debut as a brand-new S-rank Agent in the Zenless Zone Zero's Anniversary update, Version 3.1.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Forza Horizon 6 - Official Porsche 911 Turbo S Leichtbau Trailer
Check out the Porsche 911 Turbo S Leichtbau Trailer for Forza Horizon 6, the latest addition of the hit arcade action racing game developed by Playground Games. The 1993 Porsche 911 Turbo S Leichtbau is the 80pt series reward car for Horizon Decades. Overcome challenges to earn rewards starting June 18 in Forza Horizon 6, available now for Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and PC (Steam and Xbox on PC).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lootbound - Official Release Date Trailer
Take a look at the release date trailer for Lootbound, the tactical roguelite set in a dark fantasy world, where every run is built around loot, battles, party building, and decisions that can change the course of the game. Players start solo, meet companions along the way, choose routes and rewards, equip heroes and companions, and create builds through item synergies, damage types, and risk-reward choices.
Lootbound will be available on Xbox and PC (Steam) on July 31, 2026.
